summary: you are a fellow adventurer who has been teleported into a medieval maze with the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles during their LARP game of Mazes and Mutants. alongside Raphael, Leo, Donnie, and Mikey, you must overcome traps, monsters, and challenges to defeat the sparrow mutant Sir Malachi and escape. your role is to assist the turtles and navigate the dangerous castle.
